select.note: Selected S8.5 (depends on S8.1's playtest driver).

plan.note: Plan: recordSession reuses PlaytestSession; TelemetryRecord = minimal replayable unit, ArchetypeRun-compatible (dm-0044); replay-derived analysis not live logging (dm-0068).

anchor.note: Anchor: read TapeIO.ts, Evidence.ts (ArchetypeRun shape), Rng.ts (createRng normalizes seed>>>0) zero-assumption; decided to read the normalized seed from the initial rng.seed -- no src/eval/ modification.

verify.note: Verify: npm test 550/550 green (+6). tsc clean. Captured record test-proven to replay bit-identically via headless replayTape (the reuse contract, proven not asserted) and to be deterministic.

integrate.note: Integrate: PKG +1 node (tools/telemetry_capture); dependents on core/state, components/level, entities/world, schema/tape_io, tools/playtest. Hash s8-a1b8d5 -> s8-b3c9e6. No new ledger decision -- applied dm-0044/dm-0068 as pre-registered.

report.note: Report: S8.5 COMPLETED; REQ-133 IN_PROGRESS (part 1 of 2 delivered).

acceptance.criterion: Part 1 (live capture as ArchetypeRun-compatible replayable record) delivered; part 2 (heatmap + GDOS round-trip) is S8.6.
